texto: We had twenty eight days together but it feels like a lifetime. She’s right, without her it feels like I’m being strangled and fighting for air. I can’t just sit here day after day wishing I could at least see her face. -Colin
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a K. Lars: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “We had twenty eight days together but it feels like a lifetime. She’s right, without her it feels…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, couples, heartbreak pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de heartbreak e love.
